name: Spectrum Gusto Soup For Cat With Chicken Salmon And Zucchini 50g
shortDescription: Spectrum Gusto Soup with Chicken, Salmon & Zucchini – hydrating, low-fat 50g cat treat with tender protein and veggies, perfect as a snack or meal topper. Make sufficient drinking water available.
description: Spoil your cat with the delicious Spectrum Gusto Soup featuring tender chicken, salmon, and zucchini in a savory fish broth. This 50g complementary cat food pouch provides hydration and light nutrition with 8% protein and minimal fat, making it ideal for cats that need a supplementary treat or a hydrating snack. The high-moisture content (90%) supports fluid intake, while the natural ingredients ensure a palatable experience for cats and kittens of all ages. Key Features: Tender chicken (15.4%) and salmon (10%) for protein and omega-3 fatty acids. Zucchini (4.7%) provides vitamins, minerals, and fiber. Hydrating fish broth enhances palatability. Light and low-fat formulation (0.6% fat). Convenient 50g pouch for easy serving. Feeding Guidelines: Serve small portions with a spoon. Suitable as a daily treat or meal topper. Fresh water must always be available.
